Chapter 1: The Beginning

The Great Adventure by Author Name

This is the first paragraph of page 1. The story begins on a cold winter morning.

The protagonist woke up to find the world had changed overnight.

Everything seemed different, yet strangely familiar.

He got out of bed and walked to the window.

Outside, the snow was falling gently, covering the city in white.
